title: eriosyce subgibbosa subsp. wagenknechtii
intro: Eriosyce subgibbosa subsp. wagenknechtii is a rare and endemic species of cactus in Chile, belonging to the Eriosyce genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Eriosyce subgibbosa subsp. wagenknechtii is traditionally prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and poultices, which are used to apply its medicinal properties topically or internally.
